rule: DISSENT-WEIGHTED — every lens finding preserved verbatim; cross-lens convergence noted but NOT used to merge; single-lens HIGH/BLOCKER explicitly acknowledged

cross_lens_convergence.note: 3/5 lenses independently raised — strongest convergence in panel. Not merged; each finding preserved separately per DISSENT-WEIGHTED rule.
2/5 lenses raised. Not merged; each finding preserved separately.
Multi-lens concern across different severity ratings. Not merged.

lenses: performance (PERF-001 HIGH, PERF-002 HIGH, PERF-003 MEDIUM)
cross_lens_convergence.note: Performance-only finding — no corroboration from other lenses.

dissent_acknowledgements.note: SINGLE-LENS DISSENT — security lens rated BLOCKER; 0 other lenses raised. The architectural concern is real (untrusted transitive deps executed by Claude Code) but the BLOCKER rating is a security-lens-specific position. Panel is IMBALANCED on this finding. Arbiter acknowledges without upgrading: treat as HIGH architectural concern, not blocking correctness or performance.

dissent_acknowledgements.theme: Non-idiomatic builtins.set/dict constructors and missing type annotations
dissent_acknowledgements.note: STYLE-LENS-EXCLUSIVE HIGH findings — 0 other lenses flagged these. The builtins.* usage is a genuine idiom violation but carries no correctness, security, or performance risk. Arbiter preserves all 11 as HIGH per DISSENT-WEIGHTED rule; reviewer may downgrade to MEDIUM at their discretion.

dissent_acknowledgements.theme: get_server_configs() includes 'name' key in lockfile schema
dissent_acknowledgements.note: SINGLE-LENS DISSENT — correctness only. Schema contract violation with no corroboration from security or test lenses. Preserved as HIGH per DISSENT-WEIGHTED rule.

dissent_acknowledgements.theme: Field mapping uses 'or' not 'is not None' (silent data loss on falsy values)
dissent_acknowledgements.note: SINGLE-LENS DISSENT — correctness only. Silent data-loss on legitimate falsy values (0, empty dict) is a real correctness concern; test-coverage lens partially corroborates via TST-012 (empty extensionToLanguage not tested). Preserved as HIGH.

critical_threshold_evaluation.rule: CRITICAL = HIGH+ AND (exploitable-RCE OR data-loss OR broken-happy-path)

findings_meeting_threshold.reason: BLOCKER + broken-happy-path: NameError crashes LSP install on any plugin with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}
BLOCKER + broken-happy-path: NameError crashes error-handling path for invalid LSP configs
BLOCKER + broken-happy-path: same as COR-001 (corroborated by security lens)
HIGH + exploitable-RCE: LD_PRELOAD/PATH injection via unvalidated env dict → arbitrary code execution in LSP server process
HIGH + exploitable-RCE/data-loss: path traversal via unvalidated workspace_folder can escape plugin sandbox
HIGH + exploitable-RCE: unvalidated args pass shell metacharacters to Claude Code process spawning

all_findings.message: Undefined function `_substitute_plugin_root()` — NameError on any plugin with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} tokens
Undefined function `_surface_warning()` — NameError in validation error path
get_server_configs() includes 'name' key violating lockfile schema
from_dict() uses `or` not `is not None` — silent data loss on falsy values
LSP integration gated on should_install_mcp instead of dedicated should_install_lsp flag
Missing _substitute_plugin_root() crashes install pipeline (security lens: trust boundary break)
Transitive LSP dep trust boundary — all transitive deps treated as trusted without integrity verification [SINGLE-LENS DISSENT]
Unvalidated env dict — LD_PRELOAD/PATH injection vector to LSP process spawned by Claude Code
Unvalidated workspace_folder — path traversal can escape plugin directory
Unvalidated args — shell metacharacters pass to Claude Code process spawn
Unvalidated initialization_options and settings — arbitrary JSON depth without limits
No recursive path validation in nested initialization_options
LSP server name allows / and : characters — path traversal risk if name used in file paths
No symlink detection in workspace_folder — symlink can escape plugin root
Redundant lockfile I/O: both MCP and LSP integrators read lockfile independently in same install pass
Multiple lockfile read/write cycles: update_lockfile re-reads after resolve already read it
Sequential .lsp.json read/write in install() then remove_stale() — 2 reads and 2 writes for one logical operation
Redundant get_server_names/configs calls after install() already extracted same data
Unconditional file writes: .lsp.json and ~/.claude.json written even when content unchanged
Double path.resolve() in symlink-escape validation
Non-idiomatic builtins.set constructor: seen_names: builtins.set = builtins.set()
Systematic non-idiomatic builtins.set/dict constructors (4+ occurrences in _shared.py)
Redundant bare type annotation: result: list = []
Missing type annotations on optional params logger and diagnostics in collect_transitive()
Non-idiomatic return types: -> builtins.set and -> builtins.dict
Bare list annotation without type parameter
Missing type annotations on optional params in remove_stale()
Non-idiomatic builtins.set for stale_names parameter
Non-idiomatic builtins.set/dict in update_lockfile() parameters
Missing type annotations on optional params in public method install()
Bare list annotation for lsp_deps in install()
Non-idiomatic builtins.set/dict in run_lsp_integration() helper
Non-idiomatic builtins.set for new_lsp_servers
Bare list return type on collect_transitive()
_substitute_plugin_root() called but not defined — no tests possible; guaranteed NameError at runtime
_surface_warning() called but not defined — runtime NameError in error path
get_lsp_dependencies() and get_dev_lsp_dependencies() — ZERO test coverage
LockFile.is_semantically_equivalent() LSP drift detection — no LSP-specific test cases
deduplicate_deps() and resolve_locked_apm_yml_paths() — no dedicated unit tests
install() error paths not tested: write_text failures, permission errors
remove_stale() error paths not tested: missing .lsp.json, malformed JSON
update_lockfile() LSP section not covered for stale/new/unchanged key mutations
collect_transitive() error paths not tested: lockfile missing, corrupt, malformed LSP section
_read_lsp_file() exception paths (OSError, PermissionError, JSONDecodeError) not tested
validate() command type edge cases not tested: [], [''], None, integer
extensionToLanguage={} not tested — falsy value that triggers COR-004 or-fallback bug
Malformed .lsp.json with missing name or command not tested
run_lsp_integration() tests all mocked to success — no failure injection or should_install=False test
install() global-scope path (project_root=None) not tested — only project-scope fixture exercised
deduplicate_deps() mutation risk: input list not verified to be unmodified after call
collect_transitive() symlink boundary test missing: symlink outside plugin dir not exercised
Server name regex incomplete: / and : characters not tested (relates to S-008)
